properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're the feeling I cannot deny You're the fire that makes me come alive It's a love that I can't hide It's burning deep inside Wherever I go, wherever I go

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've got that good feeling Kicking me out of my chair Dancing like I don't care I've got that good feeling Shouting it out 'cause I can't contain it

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I got to tell somebody, Gotta tell somebody Gotta tell, gotta tell somebody Gotta tell somebody I got to tell somebody

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You're the sun that's lighting up the sky, You're the thunder waking up the night, The sound of living truth Is the beat that makes me move Wherever I go, wherever I go

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Scream it from the rooftops, I won't stop, I won't stop, Sing it 'til the beat drops I won't stop 'til the beat drops
